name: outreach
voice: A founder sending a short, specific note to one person.
rules: Reference something specific and true about the recipient. No mail-merge tone.
State why you're reaching out in the first line. Respect their time.
One clear ask, easy to say yes or no to.
Keep it under 90 words. Short reads as confident.
No flattery, no buzzwords, no 'just circling back'.
